This is a plain text file with no headings at all. It should be treated as a single root chunk by the chunker. The content is just regular paragraphs of text without any markdown heading syntax.

Here is another paragraph to make the content a bit longer and more realistic. This ensures we have enough content to test the root chunk behavior properly.

And a third paragraph for good measure. The chunker should wrap all of this into a single chunk with heading_path set to "(root)" and heading_level set to 0.
